reason: Several implemented modules are absent from ARCHITECTURE.md: tunnel.js (LAN tunnel), src/cli/ (setup/browser), HTTPS/middleware layer (cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), VAD runtime (src/runtime/vad.js), and agentic-embed runtime integration. These gaps cause architecture match to sit at 88% and prevent accurate milestone planning.
proposedChange: Add sections for: Tunnel module (src/tunnel.js), CLI module (src/cli/), HTTPS/Middleware layer, VAD runtime (src/runtime/vad.js), and agentic-embed runtime integration (src/runtime/embed.js + adapters/).
